text.value: The Implementation Guide contains no explicitly linked examples for this profile

Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility. If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason (value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)

Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility. If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason (value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)

Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility. If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason (value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)

Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility. If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason (value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)

Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility. If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason (value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)

Constraint failed: ident-1: 'Identifier with no value has limited utility. If communicating that an identifier value has been suppressed or missing, the value element SHOULD be present with an extension indicating the missing semantic - e.g. data-absent-reason (value.exists())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Identifier)
The Implementation Guide contains no explicitly linked examples for this profile
The repeating element has a pattern. The pattern will apply to all the repeats (this has not been clear to all users)
The value set expansion is too large, and only a subset has been displayed
The value set references CodeSystem 'http://standardterms.edqm.eu' which has status 'fragment'
The value set references CodeSystem 'http://standardterms.edqm.eu' which has status 'fragment'
The value set references CodeSystem 'http://standardterms.edqm.eu' which has status 'fragment'
